title.raw: 《韓長孺列傳》 Biography of Han Changru

sentences.zh: 御史大夫韓安國者，梁成安人也，後徙睢陽。

translations.literal: Imperial censor Han Anguo, Liang Cheng'an person, later moved Suiyang.
translations.idiomatic: The Grand Censor Han Anguo was a native of Cheng'an in the kingdom of Liang, and later moved to Suiyang.

sentences.zh: 嘗受韓子、雜家說於騶田生所。

translations.literal: Once received Hanzi, miscellaneous learning from Zou Tiansheng place.
translations.idiomatic: He once studied the writings of Han Feizi and the teachings of the Eclectic School under Master Zou Tian.

sentences.zh: 事梁孝王為中大夫。

translations.literal: Served Liang Xiao wang as central grand master.
translations.idiomatic: He served King Xiao of Liang as a Palace Grandee.

sentences.zh: 吳楚反時，孝王使安國及張羽為將，捍吳兵於東界。

translations.literal: Wu Chu rebellion time, Xiao wang sent Anguo and Zhang Yu as generals, defended Wu troops at eastern border.
translations.idiomatic: When Wu and Chu rebelled, King Xiao dispatched Anguo and Zhang Yu as generals to defend the eastern border against the forces of Wu.

sentences.zh: 張羽力戰，安國持重，以故吳不能過梁。

translations.literal: Zhang Yu vigorously fought, Anguo held steady, therefore Wu could not pass Liang.
translations.idiomatic: Zhang Yu fought with fierce determination while Anguo held a steady defensive position, and so the armies of Wu were unable to advance past Liang.

sentences.zh: 吳楚已破，安國、張羽名由此顯。

translations.literal: Wu Chu already broken, Anguo, Zhang Yu fame from this prominent.
translations.idiomatic: After Wu and Chu were defeated, the names of Anguo and Zhang Yu became renowned throughout the realm.

sentences.zh: 梁孝王，景帝母弟，竇太后愛之，令得自請置相、二千石，出入游戲，僭於天子。

translations.literal: Liang Xiao wang, Emperor Jing younger brother, Empress Dowager Dou loved him, ordered got self request appoint chancellor, two thousand shi, enter leave play games, exceeded emperor.
translations.idiomatic: King Xiao of Liang was Emperor Jing's younger brother by the same mother. Empress Dowager Dou doted on him, allowing him to appoint his own chancellor and officials of two-thousand-shi rank, to come and go at his pleasure, and to adopt ceremonies that exceeded those appropriate for anyone but the Son of Heaven.

sentences.zh: 天子聞之，心弗善也。

translations.literal: Emperor heard it, heart not good.
translations.idiomatic: When the Emperor heard of this, he was displeased.

sentences.zh: 太后知帝不善，乃怒梁使者，弗見，案責王所為。

translations.literal: Empress dowager knew emperor not good, then angered Liang envoys, not saw, examined blamed wang conduct.
translations.idiomatic: When the Empress Dowager learned of the Emperor's displeasure, she turned her anger upon the envoys from Liang, refusing to grant them audience and instead investigating and censuring the king's conduct.

sentences.zh: 韓安國為梁使，見大長公主而泣曰：「何梁王為人子之孝，為人臣之忠，太后曾弗省也？

translations.literal: Han An guo wei Liang shi, jian da zhang gong zhu er qi yue: "He Liang wang wei ren zi zhi xiao, wei ren chen zhi zhong, tai hou ceng fu xing ye?
translations.idiomatic: Han Anguo as Liang envoy, saw grand princess and wept: "Why Liang wang conduct filial piety as son, conduct loyalty as subject, empress dowager once not consider?

sentences.zh: 夫前日吳、楚、齊、趙七國反時，自關以東皆合從西鄉，惟梁最親為艱難。

translations.literal: Because previous Wu, Chu, Qi, Zhao seven kingdoms rebellion time, from pass eastward all united following west direction, only Liang most intimate for difficulties.
translations.idiomatic: In the past, when the Seven Kingdoms of Wu, Chu, Qi, and Zhao rebelled, all the lands east of the passes united and marched westward, yet it was Liang alone—the kingdom closest to the throne—that bore the hardest fighting.

sentences.zh: 梁王念太后、帝在中，而諸侯擾亂，一言泣數行下，跪送臣等六人，將兵擊卻吳楚，吳楚以故兵不敢西，而卒破亡，梁王之力也。

translations.literal: Liang wang thought empress dowager, emperor in center, but feudal lords disturbance chaos, one word wept several rows down, knelt sent us six people, led troops repelled Wu Chu, Wu Chu therefore troops not dared west, and finally broken perished, Liang wang effort.
translations.idiomatic: The King of Liang, mindful that the Empress Dowager and the Emperor stood at the center while the feudal lords threw the realm into chaos, wept with every word he spoke, tears streaming down his face. He knelt and sent off six of us as generals, who led troops to drive back Wu and Chu. Because of this, the armies of Wu and Chu dared not advance westward and were ultimately destroyed—all through the efforts of the King of Liang.

sentences.zh: 今太后以小睗苛禮責望梁王。

translations.literal: Now empress dowager with small suspicion harsh etiquette blamed expected Liang wang.
translations.idiomatic: Now the Empress Dowager, on account of minor suspicions and rigid protocols, censures and finds fault with the King of Liang.

sentences.zh: 梁王父兄皆帝王，所見者大，故出稱蹕，入言警，車旗皆帝所賜也，即欲以侘鄙縣，驅馳國中，以夸諸侯，令天下盡知太后、帝愛之也。

translations.literal: Liang wang father brothers all emperors, what saw great, therefore out used imperial way, enter spoke imperial alert, carriages banners all emperor granted, immediately wanted with lowly county, drive in country, to boast feudal lords, make realm all know empress dowager, emperor loved him.
translations.idiomatic: The King of Liang's father and brothers were all emperors, so naturally his vision is grand. When he goes abroad he calls for the roads to be cleared, and when he returns he commands the imperial alert—but his carriages and banners were all bestowed upon him by the Emperor himself. He merely wished to display them through the humble counties and ride throughout his kingdom, to impress the feudal lords and let all under heaven know that the Empress Dowager and the Emperor loved him.

sentences.zh: 今梁使來，輒案責之。

translations.literal: Now Liang envoys come, immediately examined blamed them.
translations.idiomatic: Yet now, whenever envoys arrive from Liang, they are immediately subjected to interrogation and blame.

sentences.zh: 梁王恐，日夜涕泣思慕，不知所為。

translations.literal: Liang wang feared, day night wept thought longed, not knew what to do.
translations.idiomatic: The King of Liang is terrified, weeping day and night with longing, not knowing what to do.

sentences.zh: 何梁王之為子孝，為臣忠，而太后弗恤也？」

translations.literal: He Liang wang zhi wei zi xiao, wei chen zhong, er tai hou fu xu ye?"
translations.idiomatic: Why Liang wang conduct filial as son, conduct loyal as subject, but empress dowager not cared?

sentences.zh: 大長公主具以告太后，太后喜曰：「為言之帝。」

translations.literal: Da zhang gong zhu ju yi gao tai hou, tai hou xi yue: "Wei yan zhi di."
translations.idiomatic: Grand princess completely to report empress dowager, empress dowager happy: "Will speak to emperor."

sentences.zh: 言之，帝心乃解，而免冠謝太后曰：「兄弟不能相教，乃為太后遺憂。」

translations.literal: Yan zhi, di xin nai jie, er mian guan xie tai hou yue: "Xiong di bu neng xiang jiao, nai wei tai hou yi you."
translations.idiomatic: Spoke it, emperor heart then resolved, moreover removed hat apologized empress dowager: "Brothers cannot mutually teach, moreover for empress dowager left worry."

sentences.zh: 悉見梁使，厚賜之。

translations.literal: All saw Liang envoys, thickly granted them.
translations.idiomatic: He received all the envoys from Liang and bestowed generous gifts upon them.

sentences.zh: 其後梁王益親驩。

translations.literal: Its after Liang wang increasingly intimate close.
translations.idiomatic: After this, the King of Liang enjoyed even closer and warmer relations with the court.

sentences.zh: 太后、長公主更賜安國可直千餘金。

translations.literal: Empress dowager, grand princess moreover granted Anguo value thousand remainder gold.
translations.idiomatic: The Empress Dowager and the Grand Princess in turn rewarded Anguo with gifts worth over a thousand pieces of gold.

sentences.zh: 名由此顯，結於漢。

translations.literal: Name from this prominent, attached to Han.
translations.idiomatic: His name became illustrious from this, and he forged ties with the Han court.

sentences.zh: 其後安國坐法抵罪，蒙獄吏田甲辱安國。

translations.literal: Its after Anguo sat law violated crime, endured prison official Tian Jia insulted Anguo.
translations.idiomatic: Later, Anguo was convicted of a crime and imprisoned. While in prison, the jailer Tian Jia humiliated him.

sentences.zh: 安國曰：「死灰獨不復然乎？」

translations.literal: An guo yue: "Si hui du bu fu ran hu?"
translations.idiomatic: Anguo said: "Dead ashes alone not again burn?"

sentences.zh: 田甲曰：「然即溺之。」

translations.literal: Tian Jia yue: "Ran ji ni zhi."
translations.idiomatic: Tian Jia said: "Burn then drown it."

sentences.zh: 居無何，梁內史缺，漢使使者拜安國為梁內史，起徒中為二千石。

translations.literal: Resided no long, Liang internal affairs vacant, Han sent envoy appointed Anguo as Liang internal affairs, rose from prisoner became two thousand shi.
translations.idiomatic: Before long, the position of Prefect of Liang fell vacant. The Han court sent an envoy to appoint Anguo as Prefect of Liang, raising him from prisoner to an official of two-thousand-shi rank.

sentences.zh: 田甲亡走。

translations.literal: Tian Jia fled ran.
translations.idiomatic: Tian Jia fled in terror.

sentences.zh: 安國曰：「甲不就官，我滅而宗。」

translations.literal: An guo yue: "Jia bu jiu guan, wo mie er zong."
translations.idiomatic: Anguo said: "Jia not go office, I extinguish your clan."

sentences.zh: 甲因肉袒謝。

translations.literal: Jia therefore bared flesh apologized.
translations.idiomatic: Tian Jia accordingly bared his torso and prostrated himself in apology.

sentences.zh: 安國笑曰：「可溺矣！

translations.literal: An guo xiao yue: "Ke ni yi!
translations.idiomatic: Anguo laughed: "Can drown!

sentences.zh: 公等足與治乎？」

translations.literal: Gong deng zu yu zhi hu?"
translations.idiomatic: You all sufficient with govern?"

sentences.zh: 卒善遇之。

translations.literal: Finally well treated him.
translations.idiomatic: In the end, Anguo treated him with kindness.

sentences.zh: 梁內史之缺也，孝王新得齊人公孫詭，說之，欲請以為內史。

translations.literal: Liang internal affairs vacancy, Xiao wang newly got Qi person Gongsun Gui, persuaded him, wanted request appoint as internal affairs.
translations.idiomatic: When the position of Prefect fell vacant, King Xiao had recently taken a liking to Gongsun Gui, a man from Qi who had won the king's favor through persuasive counsel, and wished to request his appointment as Prefect.

sentences.zh: 竇太后聞，乃詔王以安國為內史。

translations.literal: Dou empress dowager heard, then decreed wang with Anguo as internal affairs.
translations.idiomatic: When Empress Dowager Dou heard of this, she issued a decree commanding the king to appoint Anguo as Prefect instead.

sentences.zh: 公孫詭、羊勝說孝王求為帝太子及益地事，恐漢大臣不聽，乃陰使人刺漢用事謀臣。

translations.literal: Gongsun Gui, Yang Sheng persuaded Xiao wang seek be emperor crown prince and increase territory matters, feared Han great ministers not listen, then secretly sent people assassinated Han in power plotting ministers.
translations.idiomatic: Gongsun Gui and Yang Sheng persuaded King Xiao to seek designation as the Emperor's heir apparent and to petition for additional territory. Fearing that the great ministers of Han would not comply, they secretly sent assassins to murder the influential advisors at the Han court.

sentences.zh: 及殺故吳相袁盎，景帝遂聞詭、勝等計畫，乃遣使捕詭、勝，必得。

translations.literal: And killed former Wu chancellor Yuan Ang, Emperor Jing then heard Gui, Sheng etc. plans, then sent envoys arrest Gui, Sheng, must obtain.
translations.idiomatic: When they murdered Yuan Ang, the former Chancellor of Wu, Emperor Jing at last learned of the plots of Gongsun Gui and Yang Sheng. He dispatched envoys to arrest them, with orders that they must be captured.

sentences.zh: 漢使十輩至梁，相以下舉國大索，月餘不得。

translations.literal: Han sent ten groups to Liang, chancellor below mobilized whole country great search, month remainder not obtained.
translations.idiomatic: Ten groups of Han envoys arrived in Liang, and the Chancellor and all officials below him mobilized the entire kingdom in a great search, but after more than a month they could not find them.

sentences.zh: 內史安國聞詭、勝匿孝王所，安國入見王而泣曰：「主辱臣死。

translations.literal: Nei shi An guo wen gui, Sheng ni Xiao wang suo, An guo ru jian wang er qi yue: "Zhu ru chen si.
translations.idiomatic: Internal affairs Anguo heard Gui, Sheng hid Xiao wang place, Anguo entered saw wang and wept: "Lord disgraced subject dies.

sentences.zh: 大王無良臣，故事紛紛至此。

translations.literal: Great wang without good ministers, therefore matters confused to this.
translations.idiomatic: Your Majesty has no worthy ministers, and so affairs have descended into this chaos.

sentences.zh: 今詭、勝不得，請辭賜死。」

translations.literal: Jin gui, Sheng bu de, qing ci ci si."
translations.idiomatic: Now Gui, Sheng not obtained, please resign grant death."

sentences.zh: 王曰：「何至此？」

translations.literal: Wang yue: "He zhi ci?"
translations.idiomatic: Wang said: "Why to this?"

sentences.zh: 安國泣數行下，曰：「大王自度於皇帝，孰與太上皇之與高皇帝及皇帝之與臨江王親？」

translations.literal: An guo qi shu xing xia, yue: "Da wang zi duo yu huang di, shu yu tai shang huang zhi yu gao huang di ji huang di zhi yu Lin jiang wang qin?"
translations.idiomatic: Anguo wept several rows down, said: "Great wang self measure with emperor, who with Taishang emperor relation Gao emperor and emperor relation Linjiang wang close?"

sentences.zh: 孝王曰：「弗如也。」

translations.literal: Xiao wang yue: "Fu ru ye."
translations.idiomatic: Xiao wang said: "Not like."

sentences.zh: 安國曰：「夫太上、臨江親父子之閒，然而高帝曰『提三尺劍取天下者朕也』，故太上皇終不得制事，居于櫟陽。

translations.literal: An guo yue: "Fu tai shang, Lin jiang qin fu zi zhi jian, ran er gao di yue "ti san chi jian qu tian xia zhe zhen ye", gu tai shang huang zhong bu de zhi shi, ju yu Que yang.
translations.idiomatic: Anguo said: "Because Taishang, Linjiang close father son between, but Gao emperor said "raised three chi sword took realm I", therefore Taishang emperor finally not got control matters, resided in Queyang.

sentences.zh: 臨江王，適長太子也，以一言過，廢王臨江；

translations.literal: Lin jiang wang, shi zhang tai zi ye, yi yi yan guo, fei wang Lin jiang;
translations.idiomatic: Linjiang wang, legitimate eldest crown prince, with one word mistake, deposed wang Linjiang;

sentences.zh: 用宮垣事，卒自殺中尉府。

translations.literal: Used palace wall matter, finally suicide in commandants office.
translations.idiomatic: On account of the incident at the palace walls, he ended by taking his own life in the Commandant's office.

sentences.zh: 何者？

translations.literal: He zhe?
translations.idiomatic: Why?

sentences.zh: 治天下終不以私亂公。

translations.literal: Governing realm finally not with private confuse public.
translations.idiomatic: In governing the realm, he never allowed private interests to disrupt public affairs.

sentences.zh: 語曰：『雖有親父，安知其不為虎？

translations.literal: Yu yue: "Sui you qin fu, an zhi qi bu wei hu?
translations.idiomatic: Proverb says: "Though have close father, how know he not become tiger?

sentences.zh: 雖有親兄，安知其不為狼？』

translations.literal: Sui you qin xiong, an zhi qi bu wei lang?"
translations.idiomatic: Though have close brother, how know he not become wolf?"

sentences.zh: 今大王列在諸侯，悅一邪臣浮說，犯上禁，橈明法。

translations.literal: Now great wang ranked among feudal lords, pleased one wicked minister empty talk, violated emperor prohibition, bent clear law.
translations.idiomatic: Now Your Majesty ranks among the feudal lords, yet you have delighted in the reckless counsel of a treacherous minister, violated the Emperor's prohibitions, and subverted the clear laws.

sentences.zh: 天子以太后故，不忍致法於王。

translations.literal: Emperor because empress dowager reason, not bear apply law to wang.
translations.idiomatic: The Emperor, out of regard for the Empress Dowager, cannot bring himself to enforce the law against the king.

sentences.zh: 太后日夜涕泣，幸大王自改，而大王終不覺寤。

translations.literal: Empress dowager day night wept, hoped great wang self change, but great wang finally not aware enlightened.
translations.idiomatic: The Empress Dowager weeps day and night, hoping that Your Majesty will reform on your own, yet Your Majesty never comes to his senses.

sentences.zh: 有如太后宮車即晏駕，大王尚誰攀乎？」

translations.literal: You ru tai hou gong che ji yan jia, da wang shang shui pan hu?"
translations.idiomatic: If like empress dowager palace carriage immediately evening drive, great wang still who cling?"

sentences.zh: 語未卒，孝王泣數行下，謝安國曰：「吾今出詭、勝。」

translations.literal: Yu wei zu, Xiao wang qi shu xing xia, xie An guo yue: "Wu jin chu gui, Sheng."
translations.idiomatic: Words not finished, Xiao wang wept several rows down, thanked Anguo: "I now out Gui, Sheng."

sentences.zh: 詭、勝自殺。

translations.literal: Gui, Sheng suicide.
translations.idiomatic: Gongsun Gui and Yang Sheng took their own lives.

sentences.zh: 漢使還報，梁事皆得釋，安國之力也。

translations.literal: Han envoys returned report, Liang matters all got released, Anguo effort.
translations.idiomatic: When the Han envoys returned with their report, all charges against Liang were dropped—this was entirely through Anguo's efforts.

sentences.zh: 於是景帝、太后益重安國。

translations.literal: Thereupon Emperor Jing, empress dowager increasingly valued Anguo.
translations.idiomatic: From then on, Emperor Jing and the Empress Dowager valued Anguo even more highly.

sentences.zh: 孝王卒，共王即位，安國坐法失官，居家。

translations.literal: Xiao wang died, Gong wang ascended throne, Anguo sat law lost office, resided home.
translations.idiomatic: When King Xiao died and King Gong succeeded him, Anguo was convicted of an offense and stripped of his position, retiring to his home.

sentences.zh: 建元中，武安侯田蚡為漢太尉，親貴用事，安國以五百金物遺蚡。

translations.literal: Jianyuan middle, Wuan marquis Tian Fen became Han commander, intimate noble in power, Anguo with five hundred gold objects gifted Fen.
translations.idiomatic: During the Jianyuan reign period, the Marquis of Wuan, Tian Fen, served as Grand Commandant of Han. He wielded power as an intimate of the imperial family, and Anguo presented him with gifts worth five hundred pieces of gold.

sentences.zh: 蚡言安國太后，天子亦素聞其賢，即召以為北地都尉，遷為大司農。

translations.literal: Fen spoke Anguo to empress dowager, emperor also long heard his worthy, immediately summoned appointed as Beidi commandery governor, promoted to grand minister agriculture.
translations.idiomatic: Tian Fen commended Anguo to the Empress Dowager. The Emperor, who had long heard of his abilities, immediately summoned him and appointed him Commandant of Beidi, then promoted him to Grand Minister of Agriculture.

sentences.zh: 閩越、東越相攻，安國及大行王恢將。

translations.literal: Min Yue, Dong Yue mutually attacked, Anguo and grand traveler Wang Hui led.
translations.idiomatic: When Minyue and Dongyue attacked each other, Anguo and the Grand Herald Wang Hui were appointed to lead the campaign.

sentences.zh: 未至越，越殺其王降，漢兵亦罷。

translations.literal: Not arrived Yue, Yue killed their wang surrendered, Han troops also dismissed.
translations.idiomatic: Before the army reached Yue, the people of Yue killed their king and surrendered, and the Han forces were recalled.

sentences.zh: 建元六年，武安侯為丞相，安國為御史大夫。

translations.literal: Jianyuan sixth year, Wuan marquis became chancellor, Anguo became imperial censor.
translations.idiomatic: In the sixth year of the Jianyuan reign, the Marquis of Wuan became Chancellor, and Anguo became Grand Censor.

sentences.zh: 匈奴來請和親，天子下議。

translations.literal: Xiongnu came request peaceful marriage alliance, emperor below discussed.
translations.idiomatic: The Xiongnu sent envoys requesting a marriage alliance, and the Emperor referred the matter to his ministers for deliberation.

sentences.zh: 大行王恢，燕人也，數為邊吏，習知胡事。

translations.literal: Grand traveler Wang Hui, Yan person, repeatedly served border officials, familiar knew barbarian matters.
translations.idiomatic: The Grand Herald Wang Hui was a native of Yan who had served repeatedly as a border official and was well versed in the affairs of the northern tribes.

sentences.zh: 議曰：「漢與匈奴和親，率不過數歲即復倍約。

translations.literal: Yi yue: "Han yu Xiong nu he qin, lv bu guo shu sui ji fu bei yue.
translations.idiomatic: Discussed: "Han with Xiongnu peaceful marriage alliance, generally not pass several years then again break treaty.

sentences.zh: 不如勿許，興兵擊之。」

translations.literal: Bu ru wu xu, xing bing ji zhi."
translations.idiomatic: Not like not permit, raise troops attack them."

sentences.zh: 安國曰：「千里而戰，兵不獲利。

translations.literal: An guo yue: "Qian li er zhan, bing bu huo li.
translations.idiomatic: Anguo said: "Thousand li and battle, troops not obtain profit.

sentences.zh: 今匈奴負戎馬之足，懷禽獸之心，遷徙鳥舉，難得而制也。

translations.literal: Now Xiongnu rely on warhorse feet, harbor bird beast heart, migrate fly like birds, hard obtain and control.
translations.idiomatic: The Xiongnu rely on the swiftness of their warhorses, harbor the hearts of beasts, and migrate as freely as flocking birds—they are impossible to seize and control.

sentences.zh: 得其地不足以為廣，有其眾不足以為彊，自上古不屬為人。

translations.literal: Get their land insufficient to make broad, have their multitude insufficient to make strong, from ancient not belonged to people.
translations.idiomatic: To conquer their land would not be enough to expand our territory; to absorb their people would not be enough to strengthen our state. Since the most ancient times, they have never been counted among the civilized.

sentences.zh: 漢數千里爭利，則人馬罷，虜以全制其敝。

translations.literal: Han several thousand li contend profit, then men horses tired, enemy with whole control their exhaustion.
translations.idiomatic: If Han marches thousands of li to contend with them, our men and horses will be exhausted, and the enemy will use their fresh forces to exploit our weariness.

sentences.zh: 且彊弩之極，矢不能穿魯縞；

translations.literal: Qie qiang nu zhi ji, shi bu neng chuan Lu gao;
translations.idiomatic: Moreover strong crossbow extreme, arrow cannot penetrate Lu silk;

sentences.zh: 沖風之末，力不能漂鴻毛。

translations.literal: Charge wind end, force cannot drift swan feather.
translations.idiomatic: At the end of a rushing gale, the remaining force cannot even lift a goose feather.

sentences.zh: 非初不勁，末力衰也。

translations.literal: Not initial not strong, end force decline.
translations.idiomatic: It is not that the initial force was not strong—rather, the strength has been spent by the end.

sentences.zh: 擊之不便，不如和親。」

translations.literal: Ji zhi bu bian, bu ru he qin."
translations.idiomatic: Attack them inconvenient, not like peaceful marriage alliance."

sentences.zh: 群臣議者多附安國，於是上許和親。

translations.literal: Ministers discussing mostly attached Anguo, thereupon emperor permitted peaceful marriage alliance.
translations.idiomatic: The majority of the ministers who deliberated sided with Anguo, and so the Emperor approved the marriage alliance.

sentences.zh: 其明年，則元光元年，雁門馬邑豪聶翁壹因大行王恢言上曰：「匈奴初和親，親信邊，可誘以利。」

translations.literal: Qi ming nian, ze Yuan guang yuan nian, Yan men Ma yi hao Nie Weng Yi yin da xing Wang Hui yan shang yue: "Xiong nu chu he qin, qin xin bian, ke you yi li."
translations.idiomatic: Its next year, namely Yuanguang first year, Yanmen Maiyi hero Nie Wengyi through grand traveler Wang Hui spoke emperor: "Xiongnu initial peaceful marriage alliance, intimate trusted border, can lure with profit."

sentences.zh: 陰使聶翁壹為閒，亡入匈奴，謂單于曰：「吾能斬馬邑令丞吏，以城降，財物可盡得。」

translations.literal: Yin shi Nie Weng Yi wei jian, wang ru Xiong nu, wei chan yu yue: "Wu neng zhan Ma yi ling cheng li, yi cheng xiang, cai wu ke jin de."
translations.idiomatic: Secretly sent Nie Wengyi as spy, fled entered Xiongnu, told chanyu: "I can behead Maiyi magistrate deputy officials, with city surrender, wealth objects can all obtain."

sentences.zh: 單于愛信之，以為然，許聶翁壹。

translations.literal: Chanyu loved trusted him, considered correct, permitted Nie Wengyi.
translations.idiomatic: The Chanyu, who trusted and favored him, found the proposal reasonable and granted Nie Wengyi permission to proceed.

sentences.zh: 聶翁壹乃還，詐斬死罪囚，縣其頭馬邑城，示單于使者為信。

translations.literal: Nie Wengyi then returned, falsely beheaded death penalty prisoner, hung his head Maiyi city, showed chanyu envoy as proof.
translations.idiomatic: Nie Wengyi then returned, beheaded a prisoner condemned to death, and hung the head on the walls of Maiyi, displaying it to the Chanyu's envoy as proof.

sentences.zh: 曰：「馬邑長吏已死，可急來。」

translations.literal: Yue: "Ma yi zhang li yi si, ke ji lai."
translations.idiomatic: Said: "Maiyi chief officials already died, can urgently come."

sentences.zh: 於是單于穿塞將十餘萬騎，入武州塞。

translations.literal: Thereupon chanyu pierced pass led ten remainder ten thousand cavalry, entered Wuzhou pass.
translations.idiomatic: The Chanyu then breached the frontier and led more than a hundred thousand cavalry through the Wuzhou pass.

sentences.zh: 當是時，漢伏兵車騎材官二十餘萬，匿馬邑旁谷中。

translations.literal: At this time, Han ambushed troops chariots cavalry material officials twenty remainder ten thousand, hid Maiyi side valley middle.
translations.idiomatic: At that time, the Han had concealed more than two hundred thousand troops—chariots, cavalry, and infantry—in the valleys beside Maiyi.

sentences.zh: 衛尉李廣為驍騎將軍，太仆公孫賀為輕車將軍，大行王恢為將屯將軍，太中大夫李息為材官將軍。

translations.literal: Guard Wei Li Guang became fierce cavalry general, master carriages Gongsun He became light chariot general, grand traveler Wang Hui became army garrison general, palace grand master Li Xi became material official general.
translations.idiomatic: The Captain of the Guard Li Guang was appointed General of Agile Cavalry, the Grand Coachman Gongsun He was appointed General of Light Chariots, the Grand Herald Wang Hui was appointed General of the Garrison, and the Palace Grandee Li Xi was appointed General of Infantry.

sentences.zh: 御史大夫韓安國為護軍將軍，諸將皆屬護軍。

translations.literal: Imperial censor Han Anguo became protect army general, various generals all belonged protect army.
translations.idiomatic: The Grand Censor Han Anguo was appointed General Protector of the Army, and all the other generals were placed under his command.

sentences.zh: 約單于入馬邑而漢兵縱發。

translations.literal: Agreed chanyu enter Maiyi and Han troops then launch.
translations.idiomatic: The plan was that once the Chanyu entered Maiyi, the Han forces would spring their attack.

sentences.zh: 王恢、李息、李廣別從代主擊其輜重。

translations.literal: Wang Hui, Li Xi, Li Guang separately from Dai command strike their baggage heavy.
translations.idiomatic: Wang Hui, Li Xi, and Li Guang were to advance separately from Dai to strike the Xiongnu supply train.

sentences.zh: 於是單于入漢長城武州塞。

translations.literal: Thereupon chanyu entered Han Great Wall Wuzhou pass.
translations.idiomatic: The Chanyu then entered the Han Great Wall through the Wuzhou pass.

sentences.zh: 未至馬邑百餘里，行掠鹵，徒見畜牧於野，不見一人。

translations.literal: Not arrived Maiyi hundred remainder li, went plundering, only saw livestock pasturing in field, not saw one person.
translations.idiomatic: When he was still more than a hundred li from Maiyi, he went raiding and plundering, but saw only livestock grazing in the fields and not a single person.

sentences.zh: 單于怪之，攻烽燧，得武州尉史。

translations.literal: Chanyu wondered it, attacked beacon signal, obtained Wuzhou wei shi.
translations.idiomatic: The Chanyu grew suspicious, attacked a beacon tower, and captured the garrison officer of Wuzhou.

sentences.zh: 欲刺問尉史。

translations.literal: Wanted stab question wei shi.
translations.idiomatic: He threatened the officer with torture to extract information.

sentences.zh: 尉史曰：「漢兵數十萬伏馬邑下。」

translations.literal: Wei shi yue: "Han bing shu shi wan fu Ma yi xia."
translations.idiomatic: Wei shi said: "Han troops several ten ten thousand ambush Maiyi below."

sentences.zh: 單于顧謂左右曰：「幾為漢所賣！」

translations.literal: Chan yu gu wei zuo you yue: "Ji wei Han suo mai!"
translations.idiomatic: Chanyu turned told left right: "Almost became Han sold!"

sentences.zh: 乃引兵還。

translations.literal: Then led troops return.
translations.idiomatic: He then withdrew his forces and turned back.

sentences.zh: 出塞，曰：「吾得尉史，乃天也。」

translations.literal: Chu sai, yue: "Wu de wei shi, nai tian ye."
translations.idiomatic: Out pass, said: "I obtained wei shi, namely heaven."

sentences.zh: 命尉史為「天王」。

translations.literal: Ming wei shi wei "Tian wang".
translations.idiomatic: Named wei shi as "Heaven wang".

sentences.zh: 塞下傳言單于已引去。

translations.literal: Pass below transmitted words chanyu already led away.
translations.idiomatic: Word reached the frontier that the Chanyu had already retreated.

sentences.zh: 漢兵追至塞，度弗及，即罷。

translations.literal: Han troops pursued to pass, measured not reach, then dismissed.
translations.idiomatic: The Han forces gave chase as far as the frontier, but judging they could not catch him, they withdrew.

sentences.zh: 王恢等兵三萬，聞單于不與漢合，度往擊輜重，必與單于精兵戰，漢兵勢必敗，則以便宜罷兵，皆無功。

translations.literal: Wang Hui etc. troops three ten thousand, heard chanyu not with Han engage, measured go attack baggage heavy, must with chanyu elite troops battle, Han troops situation must defeat, then with discretion dismissed troops, all no merit.
translations.idiomatic: Wang Hui and his thirty thousand troops, learning that the Chanyu had not engaged with the Han forces, calculated that if they went to attack the supply train they would inevitably have to fight the Chanyu's elite cavalry and would surely be defeated. He therefore used his discretion to withdraw his forces, and all ended without achievement.

sentences.zh: 天子怒王恢不出擊單于輜重，擅引兵罷也。

translations.literal: Emperor angered Wang Hui not out attack chanyu baggage heavy, arbitrarily led troops dismissed.
translations.idiomatic: The Emperor was furious that Wang Hui had failed to attack the Chanyu's supply train and had withdrawn his forces without authorization.

sentences.zh: 恢曰：「始約虜入馬邑城，兵與單于接，而臣擊其輜重，可得利。

translations.literal: Hui yue: "Shi yue lu ru Ma yi cheng, bing yu chan yu jie, er chen ji qi zi zhong, ke de li.
translations.idiomatic: Hui said: "Initial agreement enemy enter Maiyi city, troops with chanyu engage, and subject attack their baggage heavy, could obtain profit.

sentences.zh: 今單于聞，不至而還，臣以三萬人眾不敵，禔取辱耳。

translations.literal: Now chanyu heard, not arrived and return, subject with three ten thousand people multitude not match, only take humiliation.
translations.idiomatic: Now that the Chanyu was forewarned and turned back before arriving, with my thirty thousand men I was no match for him and would only have met with humiliation.

sentences.zh: 臣固知還而斬，然得完陛下士三萬人。」

translations.literal: Chen gu zhi huan er zhan, ran de wan bixia shi san wan ren."
translations.idiomatic: Subject firmly knew return and behead, but obtain complete your majesty soldiers three ten thousand people."

sentences.zh: 於是下恢廷尉。

translations.literal: Thereupon sent Hui to judicial court.
translations.idiomatic: Wang Hui was thereupon handed over to the Commandant of Justice.

sentences.zh: 廷尉當恢逗橈，當斬。

translations.literal: Judicial court judged Hui delayed obstructed, should behead.
translations.idiomatic: The Commandant of Justice charged Hui with delaying and obstructing the campaign, and sentenced him to death.

sentences.zh: 恢私行千金丞相蚡。

translations.literal: Hui privately sent thousand gold chancellor Fen.
translations.idiomatic: Hui secretly sent a thousand pieces of gold to the Chancellor Tian Fen.

sentences.zh: 蚡不敢言上，而言於太后曰：「王恢首造馬邑事，今不成而誅恢，是為匈奴報仇也。」

translations.literal: Fen bu gan yan shang, er yan yu tai hou yue: "Wang Hui shou zao Ma yi shi, jin bu cheng er zhu Hui, shi wei Xiong nu bao chou ye."
translations.idiomatic: Fen not dared speak emperor, but spoke to empress dowager: "Wang Hui first created Maiyi matter, now not succeed and execute Hui, is for Xiongnu avenge."

sentences.zh: 上朝太后，太后以丞相言告上。

translations.literal: Emperor court empress dowager, empress dowager with chancellor words told emperor.
translations.idiomatic: When the Emperor paid his respects to the Empress Dowager, she conveyed the Chancellor's words to him.

sentences.zh: 上曰：「首為馬邑事者，恢也，故發天下兵數十萬，從其言，為此。

translations.literal: Shang yue: "Shou wei Ma yi shi zhe, Hui ye, gu fa tian xia bing shu shi wan, cong qi yan, wei ci.
translations.idiomatic: Emperor said: "First for Maiyi matter, Hui, therefore sent realm troops several ten ten thousand, followed his words, for this.

sentences.zh: 且縱單于不可得，恢所部擊其輜重，猶頗可得，以慰士大夫心。

translations.literal: Moreover even chanyu cannot obtain, Hui his command attack their baggage heavy, still considerably can obtain, to comfort scholar officials heart.
translations.idiomatic: Even if the Chanyu himself could not have been captured, had Hui led his forces to attack the supply train, there would still have been considerable gains to comfort the hearts of the soldiers and officials.

sentences.zh: 今不誅恢，無以謝天下。」

translations.literal: Jin bu zhu Hui, wu yi xie tian xia."
translations.idiomatic: Now not execute Hui, nothing to apologize realm."

sentences.zh: 於是恢聞之，乃自殺。

translations.literal: Thereupon Hui heard it, then suicide.
translations.idiomatic: When Hui learned of this, he took his own life.

sentences.zh: 安國為人多大略，智足以當世取合，而出於忠厚焉。

translations.literal: Anguo as person much grand strategy, wisdom sufficient to match age obtain harmony, moreover came from loyal generous.
translations.idiomatic: Anguo was a man of broad vision and grand strategy, wise enough to navigate the politics of his age and win favor, and all of this was rooted in his loyalty and generosity of spirit.

sentences.zh: 貪嗜於財。

translations.literal: Greedy fond of wealth.
translations.idiomatic: He was, however, greedy for wealth.

sentences.zh: 所推舉皆廉士，賢於己者也。

translations.literal: What recommended all incorruptible scholars, worthy than himself.
translations.idiomatic: Those he recommended were all men of integrity, worthier than himself.

sentences.zh: 於梁舉壺遂、臧固、郅他，皆天下名士，士亦以此稱慕之，唯天子以為國器。

translations.literal: In Liang recommended Hu Sui, Zang Gu, Zhi Ta, all realm famous scholars, scholars also with this praised admired him, only emperor considered as state vessel.
translations.idiomatic: While in Liang, he recommended Hu Sui, Zang Gu, and Zhi Ta, all renowned scholars of the realm. The scholarly community praised and admired him for this, and even the Emperor regarded him as a pillar of the state.

sentences.zh: 安國為御史大夫四歲餘，丞相田蚡死，安國行丞相事，奉引墮車蹇。

translations.literal: Anguo became imperial censor four years remainder, chancellor Tian Fen died, Anguo acted chancellor matters, honored pulled carriage lame.
translations.idiomatic: Anguo served as Grand Censor for more than four years. When the Chancellor Tian Fen died, Anguo assumed the duties of Chancellor. But while leading the imperial procession, he fell from his carriage and injured his leg.

sentences.zh: 天子議置相，欲用安國，使使視之，蹇甚，乃更以平棘侯薛澤為丞相。

translations.literal: Emperor discussed appoint chancellor, wanted use Anguo, sent envoy see him, lame severe, then changed with Pingji marquis Xue Ze as chancellor.
translations.idiomatic: The Emperor wished to make Anguo Chancellor and sent an envoy to assess his condition, but his lameness was severe. He therefore appointed the Marquis of Pingji, Xue Ze, as Chancellor instead.

sentences.zh: 安國病免數月，蹇愈，上復以安國為中尉。

translations.literal: Anguo ill dismissed several months, lame cured, emperor again with Anguo as commandants.
translations.idiomatic: Anguo was relieved of his duties for several months due to illness. When his lameness healed, the Emperor reappointed him as Commandant of the Capital.

sentences.zh: 歲餘，徙為衛尉。

translations.literal: Year remainder, moved became guard wei.
translations.idiomatic: After about a year, he was transferred to the post of Captain of the Guard.

sentences.zh: 車騎將軍衛青擊匈奴，出上谷，破胡蘢城。

translations.literal: Chariot cavalry general Wei Qing attacked Xiongnu, out Shanggu, broke Hu Wei city.
translations.idiomatic: The General of Chariots and Cavalry, Wei Qing, attacked the Xiongnu, marching out from Shanggu, and captured the Xiongnu fortress of Longcheng.

sentences.zh: 將軍李廣為匈奴所得，復失之；

translations.literal: Jiang jun Li Guang wei Xiong nu suo de, fu shi zhi;
translations.idiomatic: General Li Guang by Xiongnu obtained, again lost him;

sentences.zh: 公孫敖大亡卒：皆當斬，贖為庶人。

translations.literal: Gong sun Ao da wang zu: jie dang zhan, shu wei shu ren.
translations.idiomatic: Gongsun Ao greatly lost soldiers: all should behead, redeemed as commoners.

sentences.zh: 明年，匈奴大入邊，殺遼西太守，及入鴈門，所殺略數千人。

translations.literal: Next year, Xiongnu greatly entered border, killed Liaoxi governor, and entered Yanmen, what killed plundered several thousand people.
translations.idiomatic: The following year, the Xiongnu launched a major invasion of the border, killed the Governor of Liaoxi, and penetrated Yanmen, killing and capturing several thousand people.

sentences.zh: 車騎將軍衛青擊之，出鴈門。

translations.literal: Chariot cavalry general Wei Qing attacked them, out Yanmen.
translations.idiomatic: The General of Chariots and Cavalry, Wei Qing, was sent to attack them, marching out from Yanmen.

sentences.zh: 衛尉安國為材官將軍，屯於漁陽。

translations.literal: Guard wei Anguo became material official general, garrisoned at Yuyang.
translations.idiomatic: The Captain of the Guard, Anguo, was appointed General of Infantry and garrisoned at Yuyang.

sentences.zh: 安國捕生虜，言匈奴遠去。

translations.literal: Anguo captured living captives, spoke Xiongnu far gone.
translations.idiomatic: Anguo captured prisoners alive, who reported that the Xiongnu had withdrawn far away.

sentences.zh: 即上書言方田作時，請且罷軍屯。

translations.literal: Immediately memorial spoke farming work time, requested temporarily dismiss army garrison.
translations.idiomatic: He thereupon submitted a memorial stating that it was the farming season and requested that the garrison be temporarily disbanded.

sentences.zh: 罷軍屯月餘，匈奴大入上谷、漁陽。

translations.literal: Dismissed army garrison month remainder, Xiongnu greatly entered Shanggu, Yuyang.
translations.idiomatic: Barely a month after the garrison was disbanded, the Xiongnu launched a massive invasion of Shanggu and Yuyang.

sentences.zh: 安國壁乃有七百餘人，出與戰，不勝，復入壁。

translations.literal: Anguo defensive wall then had seven hundred remainder people, out with battle, not win, again entered wall.
translations.idiomatic: Anguo's fortress held only some seven hundred men. They sallied forth to fight but could not prevail, and retreated back behind the walls.

sentences.zh: 匈奴虜略千餘人及畜產而去。

translations.literal: Xiongnu captives plundered thousand remainder people and livestock produce and left.
translations.idiomatic: The Xiongnu captured and carried off more than a thousand people along with their livestock and departed.

sentences.zh: 天子聞之，怒，使使責讓安國。

translations.literal: Emperor heard it, angered, sent envoy blamed rebuked Anguo.
translations.idiomatic: When the Emperor heard of this, he was furious and sent an envoy to reprimand Anguo.

sentences.zh: 徒安國益東，屯右北平。

translations.literal: Moved Anguo eastward more, garrisoned Youbeiping.
translations.idiomatic: He transferred Anguo further east to garrison Youbeiping.

sentences.zh: 是時匈奴虜言當入東方。

translations.literal: At time Xiongnu captives spoke should enter eastern direction.
translations.idiomatic: At that time, Xiongnu prisoners reported that an invasion of the eastern regions was imminent.

sentences.zh: 安國始為御史大夫及護軍，後稍斥疏，下遷；

translations.literal: An guo shi wei yu shi da fu ji hu jun, hou shao chi shu, xia qian;
translations.idiomatic: Anguo began became imperial censor and protect army, later gradually demoted distant, descended demoted;

sentences.zh: 而新幸壯將軍衛青等有功，益貴。

translations.literal: But newly favored vigorous generals Wei Qing etc. had merit, increasingly noble.
translations.idiomatic: Meanwhile, the newly favored young generals such as Wei Qing had won victories and were rising ever higher in status.

sentences.zh: 安國既疏遠，默默也；

translations.literal: An guo ji shu yuan, mo mo ye;
translations.idiomatic: Anguo already distant, silent;

sentences.zh: 將屯又為匈奴所欺，失亡多，甚自愧。

translations.literal: Army garrison moreover by Xiongnu deceived, lost perished many, very self ashamed.
translations.idiomatic: His garrison command had been outwitted by the Xiongnu, suffering heavy losses, and he was deeply ashamed.

sentences.zh: 幸得罷歸，乃益東徙屯，意忽忽不樂。

translations.literal: Fortunately obtained dismissed return, then increasingly eastward moved garrison, intention despondent not happy.
translations.idiomatic: When he was finally relieved from the frontier, only to be transferred to a garrison even further east, he fell into a deep melancholy.

sentences.zh: 數月，病歐血死。

translations.literal: Several months, ill vomited blood died.
translations.idiomatic: After several months, he fell ill, vomited blood, and died.

sentences.zh: 安國以元朔二年中卒。

translations.literal: Anguo with Yuanshuo second year middle died.
translations.idiomatic: Anguo died in the middle of the second year of the Yuanshuo reign.

sentences.zh: 太史公曰：余與壺遂定律歷，觀韓長孺之義，壺遂之深中隱厚。

translations.literal: Tai shi gong yue: Yu yu Hu Sui ding lv li, guan Han Chang ru zhi yi, Hu Sui zhi shen zhong yin hou.
translations.idiomatic: Grand Scribe said: I with Hu Sui determined law calendar, observed Han Changru righteousness, Hu Sui deep middle hidden generous.

sentences.zh: 世之言梁多長者，不虛哉！

translations.literal: Shi zhi yan Liang duo zhang zhe, bu xu zai!
translations.idiomatic: World speak Liang many elders, not false!

sentences.zh: 壺遂官至詹事，天子方倚以為漢相，會遂卒。

translations.literal: Hu Sui office reached director of palace affairs, emperor just relied to be Han chancellor, met Sui died.
translations.idiomatic: Hu Sui rose to the office of Director of Palace Affairs, and the Emperor was on the verge of appointing him Chancellor of Han when Hu Sui died.

sentences.zh: 不然，壺遂之內廉行修，斯鞠躬君子也。

translations.literal: Not so, Hu Sui internal incorrupt conduct cultivated, this bowed gentleman.
translations.idiomatic: Had it not been so, given Hu Sui's inner integrity and cultivated conduct, he would truly have been a gentleman devoted body and soul to the state.
